article_title: Open RAN Crosses the Tipping Point as AT&T, Rakuten and Deutsche Telekom Scale Deployments in 2026

content_preview.title: Open RAN Crosses the Tipping Point as AT&T, Rakuten and Deutsche Telekom Scale Deployments in 2026
content_preview.summary: The three largest Open RAN operators are scaling deployments in 2026, with AT&T past 50% of its Nokia-to-Ericsson radio swap and targeting 70% open-capable traffic by year-end.
content_preview.body_excerpt:
## Overview

After years of pilot projects and cautious testing, Open Radio Access Network technology is reaching commercial scale across three continents in 2026. The three operators that have bet most aggressively on the architecture — AT&T in the United States, Rakuten Mobile in Japan, and Deutsche Telekom in Europe — are each hitting deployment milestones that collectively signal Open RAN's transition from aspirational standard to operational reality.
